Video.summary: A 2 year old girl is trapped in a locked car. Lifeguards chase a bag thief. Swimmers go under after hours.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 08

Video.summary: Harrison saves a Korean tour group caught in a rip. Reidy attempts to become the greatest Bondi Santa.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards try to resuscitate a lifeless man found face down in the surf. And Reidy's back.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 01

Video.summary: A rough tackle halts a beach gridiron game. Harrison deals with bluebottles and a rat in the skate bowl.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 06

Video.summary: A lifeless swimmer is dragged from the water. Lifeguards compete in a fancy dress surfing competition.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 10

Video.summary: Lifeguards respond to a suspected heart attack. Two green whistles are used for a dislocated shoulder.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 03

Video.summary: New Years brings Snoop Dogg, rips rescues, a girl crying wolf and a helicopter search for a missing swimmer.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 02

Video.summary: A car crashes on to Bondi Beach. Taco flips the jetski, ruining his plans to impress Hoppo before he leaves.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 06

Video.summary: Troy rescues a young girl. Glick takes Kerrbox, who is afraid of heights, up in a helicopter.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 11

Video.summary: A young boy suffers a spinal injury on his birthday. Lifeguards bring their kids to Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 07

Video.summary: Tommy rescues intoxicated tourists. Reidy pursues creeps on the beach. A Danish backpacker bares all on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 10

Video.summary: When surfer Damo is treated for a spinal injury, lifeguards fear the worst.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 07

Video.summary: Jesse responds to a report of a man falling from cliffs. A thick fog makes it impossible to see swimmers.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 08

Video.summary: A Japanese tourist drowns just metres from lifeguards trying to save him. Beardy races to 2 Nepalese men.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 01

Video.summary: Kerrbox disrupts Harries' grand plans to propose to his girlfriend, putting blue paint in his spray tan.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 10

Video.summary: A brawl takes place at the North end. Tommy and Harries attempt a number of rescues.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 08

Video.summary: A diabetic suffers an epileptic fit and Troy catches bag thieves operating on Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 05

Video.summary: Two men start drowning at the north end. Lifeguards prepare for the annual lifeguard challenge.
Video.title: Season 14 Episode 06

Video.summary: A man comes to lifeguards with a deep stab wound. A man is brought to shore with no feeling in his lower body.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 04

Video.summary: A man assaults women in the surf. Lifeguards take part in a 30 day fitness and diet challenge.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 12

Video.summary: Lfeguards treat an anaphylactic shock patient for the first time and perform a surprising Christmas rescue.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 03

Video.summary: After Jack rescues a drunk swimmer, the Bondi Rescue camera crew is attacked.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 04

Video.summary: Lifeguards play a final prank on Harrison. Nicola faces her fear of open water when a boat sinks off Bondi.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 13

Video.summary: Reidy attempts a world record while a girl is blown kilometres out to sea on a paddle board.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 08

Video.summary: It's the busiest day in a decade for Bondi lifeguards, with more than one hundred rescues.
Video.title: Season 18 Episode 02

Video.summary: The surf club rescue boat collides with a reef. A boy howls in pain, suffering a mystery stomach illness.
Video.title: Season 07 Episode 03

Video.summary: Lifeguards assist a concussed boy who suffered a seizure, and a woman hit by a car. Karlie Kloss visits Bondi.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 05

Video.summary: Family members watch as lifeguards attempt to resuscitate two people from the same family.
Video.title: Season 12 Episode 12

Video.summary: Bondi local body builder Dimitri breaks both legs falling down a cliff. A paddleboarder snaps her collar bone.
Video.title: Season 09 Episode 08

Video.summary: Chappo nabs a bag snatcher. Whippet and Reidy treat an unconscious woman. A skateboarder dislocates his ankle.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 10

Video.summary: Bluebottles attack Bondi. Mouse handles a missing boy, a dislocated shoulder, and a drug overdose.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 09

Video.summary: The Hare Krishnas visit Bondi. Maxi plays a Christmas prank. A scuba diver drowns at Ben Buckler.
Video.title: Season 11 Episode 03

Video.summary: Concerns rise over a missing man and the Annual race sparks controversy as a lifeguard organizes some "help".
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 08

Video.summary: Kite surfers visit a stormy Bondi. Chappo and Jack aid victim of chest pain, Harries confronts a body surfer.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 10

Video.summary: After a mass rescue, lifeguards search for a student who didn't make it back to the beach.
Video.title: Season 17 Episode 09

Video.summary: Harry risks losing his job, thieves face a violent citizens arrest and a mother searches for her daughter.
Video.title: Season 08 Episode 01

Video.summary: An elderly lady suffers a seizure. A bizarre injury occurs involving a dog and a man's wounded manhood.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 09

Video.summary: Yatesy attempts to rescue an inexperienced surfer. After shark sightings, the lifeguards test new technology.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 11

Video.summary: A man is dragged unconscious from the water, no pulse and not breathing. Reidy and Beardy begin resuscitation.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 06

Video.summary: As lifeguards try bring back a woman found lifeless between the flags, her mentally impaired son arrives.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 02

Video.summary: Nicola attempts to rescue a bodyboarder in his 70s. A tragic spinal injury leaves the lifeguards in shock.
Video.title: Season 10 Episode 12

Video.summary: Swimmer in trouble refuses rescue. Faddy deals with a motionless man. Reidy and Corey assist two drunk girls.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 10

Video.summary: Hoppo and Evo face rescues on summer's hottest day. Newbies Matt and Noah are tested as their radio dies.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 05

Video.summary: Rookie Max wows with a rescue. A Korean student's surfing trip turns painful. Stolen car keys are reported.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 09

Video.summary: Max attends shark net rescue. Lifeguards handle skate park injuries and rescue struggling swimmers.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 03

Video.summary: Surfer seeks refuge from angry beachgoer. Spiderman visits the beach. Lifeguard teams compete in a race.
Video.title: Season 16 Episode 07
